title: Copy of PlainText.txt
summary: The document recommends that the Texas State Library and Archives Commission collaborate with the Lyndon B. Johnson Presidential Library to enhance archival preservation, digitization, and public engagement efforts. It suggests joint initiatives such as shared exhibits, digitization projects, professional exchanges, and outreach programs to strengthen historical literacy and improve access to important historical records across Texas. This partnership is presented as a valuable opportunity to advance archival practices and educational programming statewide.

title: Copy of G-Docs-Example.docx
summary: The document recommends that the Texas State Library and Archives Commission (TSLAC) focus on ensuring the long-term digital preservation and authenticity of the Texas Digital Archive despite evolving technology. It also emphasizes expanding access to historical records, particularly for genealogical research and underrepresented communities, through digitization efforts and detailed finding aids. Additionally, TSLAC is encouraged to integrate these resources with statewide programs to provide equal access to archival materials across Texas.

title: Copy of Word-Example.docx
summary: The document recommends the preservation and digitization of Texas’s historical records through the Texas Digital Archive to protect the integrity of the state's past. It emphasizes making these records accessible to everyone, from scholars to ordinary citizens, to honor all Texans’ histories. The work is framed as an ongoing duty to safeguard and share the collective memory for present and future generations.

title: PlainText.txt
summary: The document recommends that the Texas State Library and Archives Commission collaborate with the Lyndon B. Johnson Presidential Library to enhance archival preservation, digitization, and public engagement. It suggests joint initiatives such as shared exhibits, digitization projects, professional exchanges, and coordinated outreach to improve historical literacy and statewide access to important records. This partnership would help the Texas State Library leverage LBJ Library's expertise and resources to advance its mission of preserving and promoting Texas’s documentary heritage.

title: Word-Example.docx
summary: The document recommends preserving Texas’s historical records by creating and maintaining a comprehensive Texas Digital Archive, ensuring both official and everyday citizens' histories are safeguarded from loss. It emphasizes the importance of making these digital archives accessible to all, supporting genealogical research and public knowledge. The work is presented as an ongoing responsibility to honor the past and educate future generations.

title: G-Docs-Example.docx
summary: The document recommends that the Texas State Library and Archives Commission (TSLAC) focus on the long-term digital preservation and accessibility of Texas's electronic records through the Texas Digital Archive, ensuring authenticity despite evolving technology. It also advocates expanding genealogical and community history resources, particularly for underrepresented groups, by digitizing key historical records and creating comprehensive finding aids. Additionally, TSLAC emphasizes integrating these resources with statewide programs to provide equitable access to archival materials across Texas.
